LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna.label: psychic lure antenna
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntenna.description: A neural antenna that spends hemogel to draw a delayed raid or manhunter pack toward the colony.
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntennaEmbryo.label: psychic lure antenna embryo
LanguageData.FB_PsychicLureAntennaEmbryo.description: An immature neural organ that will grow into a psychic lure antenna.
